div0.head: *l
div0.entryFree:
lo/gos, o(, verbal noun of le/gw (B), with senses corresponding to le/gw (B) II and III (on the various senses of the word v.
Theo Sm. pp.72,73 H., An.Ox. 4.327 ): common in all periods in Prose and Verse, exc. Epic, in which it is found in signf. derived from le/gw (B) 111 , cf.infr. VI. 1 a:
computation, reckoning (cf. le/gw (B) II).
account of money handled, sani/des ei)s a(\s to\n l. a)nagra/fomen
IG 12.374.191
; e)di/dosan to\n l. ib. 232.2 ; l. dw/seis tw=n metexei/risas xrhma/twn
Hdt. 3.142
, cf. 143 ; ou)/te xrh/mata diaxeiri/sas th=s po/lews di/dwmi l. au)tw=n ou)/te a)rxh\n a)/rcas ou)demi/an eu)qu/nas u(pe/xw nu=n au)th=s
Lys. 24.26
; l. a)penegkei=n
Arist. Ath. 54.1
; e)n tai=s eu)qu/nais tou= toiou/tou l. u(pexe/tw
Pl. Lg. 774b
; to\n tw=n xrhma/twn l. para\ tou/twn lamba/nein
D. 8.47
; a)dikh/mata ei)s a)rguri/ou l. a)nh/konta
Din. 1.60
; suna=rai lo/gon meta/ tinos settle
accounts with, Ev.Matt. 18.23 , etc.; deu/teroi l. a second
audit,
Cod.Just. 1.4.26.1 ; o( trapezitiko\s l. banking
account, Theo Sm. p.73 H.: metaph., ou)k a)\n priai/mhn ou)deno\s l. broto/n

.
public accounts, i. e. branch of

treasurer, ib. 408.4 , Str. 17.1.12 ; o( e)pi\ tw=n l.

aerarium,
Cod.Just. 1.5.15 ); also *kai/saros l.

; kuriako\s l. ib. 18 . generally,
account, reckoning, mh\ fu=nai to\n a(/panta nika=| l. excels the whole
account, i.e. is best of
all, S. OC 1225 (lyr.); do/ntas l. tw=n e)poi/hsan
accounting for, i.e. paying the penalty for their doings, Hdt. 8.100 ; l. ai)tei=n
Pl. Plt. 285e
; l. dou=nai kai\ de/casqai

, al.; lamba/nein l. kai\ e)le/gxein

; l. h( e)pisth/mh, polla\ de\ o( l. the
account is manifold, Plot. 6.9.4 ; e)/xwn lo/gon tou= dia\ ti/ an
account of the cause, Arist. APo. 74b27 ; e)s l. tino/s on
account of, e)s xrhma/twn l.

Ma 1.14 , JRS 18.152 (Jerash); lo/gw| c. gen., by
way of, Cod.Just. 3.2.5 . al.; kata\ lo/gon tou= mege/qous if we take into

, cf. D.Chr. 31.123 .
measure, tale (cf. infr. 11.1 ), qa/lassa . . metre/etai e)s to\n au)to\n l. o(koi=os pro/sqen
Heraclit. 31
; yuxh=s e)sti l. e(auto\n au)/cwn
Id. 115
; e)s tou/tou (sc. gh/raos) l. ou) polloi/ tines a)pikne/ontai to the
point of old age, Hdt. 3.99 , cf. 7.9 .b/; o( cu/mpas l. the full
tale, Th. 7.56 , cf. Ep.Phil. 4.15 ; koinw=| l. nomi/santa common
measure, Pl. Lg. 746e ;
sum, total of expenditure, IG 42(1).103.151 (Epid., iv B.C.); o( th=s ou)si/as l., = Lat.
patrimonii modus,
Cod.Just. 1.5.12.20 .
esteem, consideration, value put on a person or thing (cf. infr. VI. 2 d), ou(= plei/wn l. h)\ tw=n a)/llwn who is of more
